ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "technology" INTEGER /* ID of the underlying technology */,
  "category" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the cryptocurrency was launched */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper" TEXT /* Link to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_segment" TEXT /* Market segment the cryptocurrency belongs to */,
  "total_supply" TEXT /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cryptocurrencies_technology FOREIGN KEY ("technology") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cryptocurrencies_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "usd_market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization in USD */,
  "btc_market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization in BTC */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume */,
  "change_1h" REAL /* 1-hour price change percentage */,
  "change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour price change percentage */,
  "change_7d" REAL /* 7-day price change percentage */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "price_btc" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in BTC */,
  "volume_7d" REAL /* 7-day trading volume */,
  "volume_30d" REAL /* 30-day trading volume */,
  "market_dominance" REAL /* Market dominance percentage */,
  "trading_pairs" INTEGER /* Number of trading pairs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "consensus_algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the technology */,
  "block_time" INTEGER /* Average block time in seconds */,
  "transaction_throughput" INTEGER /* Transaction throughput in transactions per second (TPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_wallets" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user wallet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the cryptocurrency in the user's wallet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the wallet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the wallet was last updated */,
  "wallet_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the user's wallet */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last transaction */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the wallet is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_wallets_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_wallets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, transfer) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee in the cryptocurrency */,
  "source_address" TEXT /* Source address of the transaction */,
  "destination_address" TEXT /* Destination address of the transaction */,
  "memo" TEXT /* Memo or note for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_transactions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., price, volume, market cap) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last updated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., JSON object) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dashboard was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the dashboard is public */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dashboard was last accessed */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the dashboard is the default dashboard for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last accessed */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the report is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "key" TEXT /* API key */,
  "secret" TEXT /* API secret */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was last updated */,
  "key_type" TEXT /* Type of API key */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was last used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the API key is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
